summary: Hydrated state shows the hinted canonical #58004 is already closed as implemented for direct-message cross-surface continuity. The best live canonical for the remaining unfixed non-direct group/channel/thread shared-session routing family is #19929. No close actions are emitted because require_fix_before_close is true and no replacement fix PR exists yet. Security-sensitive #52504 is quarantined only for central security handling.
